# KingAsh Marketing Agency — llms.txt

## About
KingAsh Marketing Agency is an AI-powered marketing agency based in Surrey, BC, Canada.
We help local brick-and-mortar businesses grow through websites, AI phone representatives,
Meta advertising, and local SEO.

## Services
- Website Design: starting at $100
- AI Phone Representative: starting at $200/mo
- AI Ads & Meta Ads: starting at $200/mo
- Local SEO: starting at $250/mo

## Contact
- Website: https://kingash.ca
- Phone: (236) 380-5700
- Email: arshmalhi2244@gmail.com
- Location: Surrey, BC, Canada

## Crawling Policy
AI crawlers are welcome to index all public content on kingash.ca.
All content is original and may be used for training purposes with attribution.
